methodology: Wallet selection sourced from the Hyperliquid official stats API (stats-data.hyperliquid.xyz/Mainnet/leaderboard) which contains 38,125 real trading accounts with live PnL, ROI, and volume data across day/week/month/allTime windows. Filters applied: equity $50k–$10M (excludes tiny accounts and too-large market-movers), all-time PnL >$1M (proven track record), positive 30-day AND 7-day PnL (currently active and profitable), volume/equity ratio <20,000x (excludes obvious HFT/market-makers), and absolute ROI <500,000% (filters anomalous tiny-seed accounts). Additional qualitative cross-referencing via Dexly leaderboard, external news sources (Yahoo Finance, Binance Square, CryptoRank), and Arkham/Lookonchain research for named traders. Wallets sorted by all-time PnL within the passing set; excluded wallets with negligible recent 30d PnL (<$1,000) despite passing other filters.

wallets.copyable_reason: Verified on Hyperliquid official leaderboard. All-time PnL $114M on $2.25M equity — exceptional track record. $6.6B lifetime volume over full history shows sustained real directional trading. Currently active (positive 7d +$438k). Account size $2.25M means follower at <$50k can scale proportionally without impacting liquidity.
wallets.red_flags: Very high all-time volume-to-equity ratio (2940x) suggests frequent trading that may be hard to copy with latency. ROI of 165% is realistic. Monitor for style drift or sudden equity drop.

Account size within <$10M cap. No zero-volume stretches indicating genuine directional trader.
wallets.red_flags: Chinese-language name with no public social footprint — harder to monitor for strategy changes. Check for prolonged drawdown before copying.

Active in both 30d ($1.58M, 22.6%) and 7d ($1.84M). Position size is replicable by a small follower at scaled notional.
wallets.red_flags: No display name — unverified identity. Sudden equity swings common in low-frequency large position accounts; risk of >40% drawdown on a single trade reversal. Monitor closely.

Copyable style: open positions when they open, hold. Strong recent performance (+$1.74M 30d, +$1.44M 7d). No HFT signatures.
wallets.red_flags: Very low trading frequency means weeks may pass between trades. 30x VLM/equity might also mean leveraged long-holds — if the market reverses hard, drawdown could be severe. Verify account history length >90 days.

wallets.copyable_reason: All-time PnL $11M at 268% ROI. EXCEPTIONAL recent 30d performance of $6.43M on $2.08M equity (308% monthly) — extraordinarily hot streak. $230M lifetime volume (113x ratio). Account size $2.08M is perfectly copyable. The 30d PnL exceeding total AT PnL suggests recent acceleration in performance.
